title: AdditionalTypeEnum
description: The enumerated values to specify the Additional Type of transaction that can require the collection or delivery of initial margin under a given regulatory regime for the purposes of Covered Transactions.

oneOf.title: EquityOptionOrIndexOption
oneOf.description: Single stock equity option or index option transaction as referred to in the transitional provisions (if any) of the EMIR RTS.

oneOf.title: NotApplicable
oneOf.description: No Additional Type of transaction is applicable to the regulatory regulatory regime.
